summary: Testing completed for new features: Legal Pages (Terms of Service, Privacy Policy), GDPR Compliance (data export, deletion request), and Video Consultation (Jitsi Meet integration). All features working correctly. Fixed bug in GDPR deletion-status endpoint.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug in /app/backend/routes/gdpr_routes.py: deletion-status endpoint was returning 404 due to MongoDB projection returning empty dict when fields don't exist. Added user existence check before querying deletion fields.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test client from previous iteration
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: Legal pages at /terms and /privacy, GDPR data export/delete in Client Profile > Data & Privacy tab, Video providers endpoint returns Jitsi as default. Video consultation uses Jitsi Meet (free, no API key needed).

tests_performed.api_health: PASS - API healthy and database connected
tests_performed.video_providers_endpoint: PASS - Returns Jitsi as default, Google Meet as placeholder option
tests_performed.gdpr_export_with_auth: PASS - Returns user data with profile, appointments, messages, invoices
tests_performed.gdpr_deletion_status_with_auth: PASS - Returns deletion_requested: false, status: active
tests_performed.footer_links: PASS - Privacy Policy and Terms of Service links in footer work
tests_performed.client_profile_privacy_tab: PASS - Data & Privacy tab visible and functional
tests_performed.export_data_button: PASS - Download My Data button works, downloads JSON file
tests_performed.delete_account_section: PASS - Delete Account section with warning displayed

feature_verification.terms_of_service_page: VERIFIED - Loads at /terms with all sections (Agreement, Description, User Accounts, etc.)
feature_verification.privacy_policy_page: VERIFIED - Loads at /privacy with GDPR Compliant notice and all sections
feature_verification.footer_links_landing: VERIFIED - Privacy Policy and Terms of Service links in footer
feature_verification.gdpr_data_export: VERIFIED - /api/gdpr/export-data returns all user data as JSON
feature_verification.client_profile_privacy_tab: VERIFIED - Data & Privacy tab in Client Profile
feature_verification.data_privacy_settings_component: VERIFIED - Shows GDPR info, export button, delete section

bug_fixed.issue: MongoDB projection with non-existent fields returns empty dict {}, which passes 'if not user' check but has no data
bug_fixed.fix: Added separate user existence check before querying deletion-specific fields
